SOURCE: 26480367.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (26480367.pdf)
SUMMARY: Analyst with extensive experience in Information Technology. Proficiencies include trouble shooting hardware and software issues, client and project management skills, and strong communication abilities.
SKILLS: active directory, antivirus, C programming, cable management, computer hardware support, client and client management, email management, front page design, HTML, IDS, internet access, local area network setup, Domino server configuration, office applications, Windows 2000, 2003, 2008 Server installation and maintenance, Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8 operating systems, network security, networking, operating system management, POS equipment support, power supply replacement, Python programming, routers configuration, scheduling, TCP/IP networking, technical support, desktop support, telecom systems, troubleshooting, upgrades and installations
